summary: Iteration 62: Testing Smart AI OCR Multi-Profile Certificate Parsing & Archivio Certificati feature. All 8 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Repository Documenti uses native HTML <select> dropdown, CAM section displays lotti with conformity indicators correctly.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/cam/lotti: PASS - Manual CAM lotto creation works (created IPE 120 S275JR, 750kg, 80% recycled)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/lotti?commessa_id: PASS - Lists CAM lotti filtered by commessa_id (total: 1)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/lotti?solo_conformi=true: PASS - Filter for conformi only works
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/archivio-certificati: PASS - Returns archive (empty for new user, totale: 0)
backend_api_tests.POST /api/cam/archivio-certificati/{cola: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent colata (correct behavior)
backend_api_tests.POST /api/cam/calcola/{commessa_id}: PASS - Calculates CAM conformity (750kg total, 600kg recycled, 80%, conforme_cam: true)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/report-aziendale: PASS - Aggregates CAM data (1 lotto, 750kg, 80% media, 1 commessa conforme)

frontend_ui_tests.repository_documenti_native_select: PASS - Native HTML <select> with data-testid='select-upload-type' present in code (lines 1038-1052)
frontend_ui_tests.repository_documenti_options: PASS - Options: Certificato 3.1, Conferma Ordine, Disegno, Cert. Verniciatura, Cert. Zincatura, DDT Fornitore, Foto, Altro
frontend_ui_tests.repository_upload_button: PASS - Button 'Carica File' with data-testid='btn-upload-doc' present
frontend_ui_tests.cam_section_header: PASS - 'CAM - Criteri Ambientali Minimi' with Leaf icon and count badge
frontend_ui_tests.cam_summary_card: PASS - Shows CONFORME CAM with DM 256/2022 badge, 750kg total, 600kg recycled, 80.0%, threshold 75%
frontend_ui_tests.cam_lotto_cards: PASS - Displays CAM lotto with conformity indicator (green check for conforme)

smart_ocr_code_review.multi_profile_parsing: Code at lines 998-1031 in commessa_ops.py shows AI prompt requesting 'profili' as array with multiple profiles
smart_ocr_code_review.profile_normalization: _normalize_profilo function at line 1119-1126 handles IPE 100 = ipe100 = IPE100
smart_ocr_code_review._match_profili_to_commesse: Helper function at lines 1129-1341 cross-references profiles with OdA righe, RdP righe, DDT arrivi
smart_ocr_code_review.archivio_certificati: Unmatched profiles archived at lines 1323-1337, endpoint at cam.py lines 589-640

critical_code_review_comments: Smart AI OCR Multi-Profile parsing correctly implemented in /app/backend/routes/commessa_ops.py (lines 946-1116)
Profile normalization handles case/spacing variations (IPE 100 = IPE100)
Cross-reference matching uses OdA righe, RdP righe, and DDT arrivi for automatic assignment
Archivio certificati endpoint properly stores unmatched profiles
Repository Documenti uses native HTML <select> instead of Radix Select per requirements
CAM section displays conformity status with proper visual indicators
test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test session test_session_iter62_1772310577158
seed_data_creation: Created test commessa com_2796f83c75e7 and CAM lotto (TEST_IPE 120, 750kg, 80% recycled) - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart AI OCR Multi-Profile feature implemented. Key endpoints: POST /api/commesse/{cid}/documenti/{doc_id}/parse-certificato triggers AI analysis returning risultati_match array with tipo (commessa_corrente/altra_commessa/archivio). GET /api/cam/archivio-certificati returns unassigned profiles. POST /api/cam/archivio-certificati/{colata}/assegna assigns to commessa. Frontend CommessaOpsPanel.js uses native <select> for document type. Note: Actual AI parsing requires real certificate PDF file and OpenAI API key.
